meta.title: Issa KANE — AI & Data Engineer
meta.description: Portfolio of Issa KANE, AI & Data engineer, available for apprenticeship from February 2026. EFREI Paris, Machine Learning & Big Data.

hero.name: Issa KANE
hero.signature: I turn raw data into intelligent systems.
hero.subtitle: AI & Data Engineer — EFREI Paris

story.title: My story
story.intro: Born in Senegal, high school diploma with honors in Dakar, then EFREI Paris in integrated prep class.

chapter1.title: First step into the professional world
chapter1.text: In my first year, I did a commercial internship at SFR to understand the business — not just the code. 500 calls a day, collecting client requirements.

chapter2.title: From observation to building
chapter2.text: Two years later I came back to SFR as a systems engineer, this time building the systems I had observed. I built a Kafka/Elasticsearch pipeline from scratch, integrated ML for anomaly detection in production.

chapter3.title: Master 1 — Towards AI in industry
chapter3.text: Now in my Master 1 at EFREI, I'm looking for an AI/Data apprenticeship to keep building systems that have a real impact.

chapter4.title: Available for apprenticeship
chapter4.text: Schedule: 3 days at company / 2 days at school. Île-de-France and partial remote.

bullets: Developed a Python/Flask web app for IS performance tracking and management
Data pipelines with Kafka + Elasticsearch integration
Integrated ML models for anomaly detection and performance optimization
Strategic project presented to management, led autonomously
sfr_engineer.impact: Full pipeline Kafka → Elasticsearch → ML → Prometheus alerting, presented to SFR management

bullets: Collected client requirements for their websites

petfinder.title: PetFinder
petfinder.description: Pet adoption platform with authentication, listing management, and real-time multi-criteria search.
petfinder.impact: Robust MVC architecture with Spring Boot, reactive Vue.js SPA

bookreco.title: Book Recommendation System
bookreco.description: Personalized recommendation engine combining content analysis and user behavior.

cproject.title: Recommendations in C
cproject.description: User mood analysis to suggest movies and books. Low-level implementation without framework.
cproject.impact: Manual memory management, custom scoring algorithms

sfr.title: SFR IS App
sfr.description: IS performance dashboard with real-time anomaly detection. Presented to SFR management.
sfr.impact: Full pipeline Kafka → ES → ML → alerting, in production environment

fitness.title: Discipline — 26 months of fitness
fitness.text: Over two years of consistent training taught me what data can't yet measure: consistency. I code like I train — with method, patience, and always looking to improve every session.

football.title: Team spirit — Football since age 7
football.text: In football, victory is collective or it isn't. I bring this team culture to my projects — I listen, communicate, and code for the team as much as for the machine.

curiosity.title: Curiosity & Autonomy
curiosity.text: I learn fast and independently when I have to — pure C, LangChain, GLSL. But I also love sharing what I discover.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Looking for an AI/Data apprenticeship from February 2026
